summary: Planned conservative live PR inventory classifications for five open PRs. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive item was identified, and no mutating close/merge/fix action is recommended.

actions.reason: Independent open PR with focused code and passing proof/check evidence; leave for maintainer review rather than close or merge in this plan-only inventory shard.
Independent open PR with active author/check blockers; keep open for normal author and maintainer follow-up rather than close in this inventory shard.
Independent broad hardening PR with passing checks but explicit risk/dirty-candidate labels; keep open for maintainer review.
Independent Feishu provider/message-delivery PR with no security-sensitive route required by the preflight artifact; keep open for author/maintainer follow-up.
Independent focused UI PR with passing proof/check evidence; leave open for maintainer technical review.
